completed_work: Added helper validators for L0 list shape, cid uniqueness, token_cost, optional citation, candidate/included items, and dropped items.

Added tests covering valid current summary shape, required lists, duplicate cids, invalid token_cost, invalid optional citation, included-without-candidate, included/dropped overlap, invalid dropped_reason, over_budget without candidate, and cross-reason field rejection.
key_decisions: Keep this slice pure/read-only and summary-layer only.
Validate actual current provider summary fields: cid, citation, inclusion_reason, token_cost, and dropped_reason.
Allow not_found drops outside l0_candidates, while requiring over_budget drops to refer to l0_candidates.
next_actions: Consider either wiring the invariant validator into optional CLI validation, validating L0 chunk JSON at create/load time, or proceeding toward guarded explicit L0 context-pack inclusion.
risks: Future dropped_reason values will require validator and test updates.
The validator is not automatically invoked by CLI or production summary formatting yet.
This does not validate L0 chunk JSON files or citation format semantics.
summary_text: AI-Lab added a pure read-only provider L0 summary invariant validator. validate_provider_l0_invariants checks the current provider summary l0_candidates, l0_included, and l0_dropped structure using actual implemented fields: cid, citation, inclusion_reason, token_cost, and dropped_reason. The validator enforces list/object shape, non-empty cid, non-negative integer token_cost, optional non-empty citation, inclusion/dropped reason exclusivity, duplicate cid detection, included subset of candidates, included/dropped disjointness, over_budget drops tied to candidates, and current dropped_reason values not_found and over_budget. This does not alter provider summary output, prompt assembly, context packs, L0 store loading, L0 creation, or CLI behavior. Full suite passed with 235 tests.
